name: Hope Trigger
short_description: HOPE-TRIGGER is a finely crafted 2D side-scrolling action RPG. Switch between Original Sin styles, equip Enchanted Artifacts, Ukehi, and magic, and unlock classes through exploration. Each defeat may trigger Destiny’s Written Revelation—granting new buffs for your journey.
detailed_description:
"Once, this was a beautiful kingdom.

Every citizen wore a smile.

It was a land where technology and magic thrived in harmony—renowned for its mastery of alchemy, revered by all.

But one night, everything fell apart. The barbarians broke their oath. The kingdom was lost. The people scattered.

And I...

was left imprisoned in endless darkness."

The story begins a thousand years ago, when a flourishing civilization vanished overnight, leaving behind only desolate ruins.
Now, a millennium later, a young girl arrives at these ruins and meets someone who claims to be the queen of that fallen kingdom.

Together, they begin to uncover the secrets of a world long forgotten.

Yet all of this... only exists within an indistinguishable, illusory world.

========================================================
HOPE-TRIGGER

is a handcrafted 2D action RPG with momentum-driven progression.

Switch between Original Sin fighting styles, equip Enchanted Artifacts, and master devastating magical skills.

When you fall in battle, the Destiny’s Written Revelation system may awaken—triggering a cinematic rebirth and granting powerful buffs tied to your journey.

========================================================

Game System:

A. Combat Features:

  • Original Sin Combos:

    A combo system themed around the Seven Deadly Sins, where players can freely mix and match abilities to create a unique combat style.

  • Varied Magic:

    Utilize multi-elemental magic to flexibly respond to crises, unleash powerful forces, and turn the tide of battle.

  • Parry and Counterattack:

    Master precise parrying techniques to break enemy attacks and deliver a devastating counterstrike, turning the tide of battle.

  • Ukehi Buffs:

    Activate up to dozens of enhancement effects to help you overcome challenges and carve your path through the adventure.

B. Class System:

  • As the story unfolds, and through exploring maps or completing quests, new and distinctive classes are gradually unlocked, bringing fresh surprises and challenges to your adventure.

  • Burst Enhancement: By activating “Burst,” each class can trigger unique enhancements that fully amplify its combat style, helping players overcome powerful foes in critical moments.

  • Class Progression: The four base classes (Warrior, Priest, Mage, Archer) can advance into intermediate → advanced classes, inheriting and expanding their abilities.

    • Example: Priest → Monk: Retains enhanced healing capabilities while strengthening martial arts-style combat moves.

  • Special Classes: Advanced classes (such as Miko, Assassin, Paladin, etc.) can only be unlocked through quests, and may even alter your controls—for example, changing “bow attacks” into “assassinations”—offering a completely new combat experience.



C. Growth Features:


  • Enchanted Artifacts: Special equipment obtained through quests, crafting, or defeating enemies. They can alter Original Sin combat styles, enhance core stats (critical, attack, defense), or strengthen class traits. With limited slots available, players must make careful choices to build their own unique setup.

  • Alchemy: Use collected materials to craft a wide variety of Enchanted Artifacts, unlocking new combat styles and adding more strategy and individuality to every battle.

  • Arcana: Explore dungeons and gather special items to activate Arcana passive skills, greatly enhancing your character’s abilities and opening up new possibilities for your adventure.


D. Adventure Features:


Exploration: Traverse maze-like maps full of puzzles and surprises, uncover hidden treasures, and experience endless exploration fun.

  • Gathering & Crafting: Collect a variety of materials and cook delicious meals, adding more possibilities to your adventure.

  • Quests: Meet diverse characters in the world, help them solve their problems, listen to their touching stories, and weave the chapters of your shared adventure.

E.Ark:

  • The Destiny of the Experiment Subject:

    As an experimental life form, you will traverse the world of memories, uncover mysteries, and search for a way to save a world on the brink of collapse.

  • Memory Threshold Warning:

    The subject is extremely fragile and cannot withstand repeated deaths within the memory world. Proceed with caution—protect them at all costs.

  • Backup Protocol:

    Through the backup system, the subject’s record can be restored to a designated checkpoint, avoiding total mental collapse and preserving a chance for survival.

F. Destiny’s Written Revelation

  • Defeat is not the end, but a chance for strength to awaken.

  • With each loss, Destiny’s Written Revelation may be triggered, opening new possibilities and rewriting your future.

  • Upon activation, not only will your character’s abilities be enhanced, but you will also unlock Destiny Levels. As your Destiny Level rises, higher tiers of growth will become available.

========================================================


Game Features

  • Dual Combo System: Equip two “Original Sin” combat styles and freely switch between them in battle. Each style unleashes unique three-hit combos, letting you chain together exhilarating attacks and enjoy the ultimate thrill of combat.

  • Unique Magic System: Extract Red Magic Elements from monsters, convert them into mana, and unleash dazzling and deadly spells to overwhelm your foes and turn the tide of battle.

  • Class Progression: The four base classes (Warrior, Priest, Mage, Archer) can advance into higher-tier classes, unlocking exclusive Burst enhancements and shaping diverse combat playstyles.

  • Enchanted Artifacts: Special equipment obtained through quests, crafting, or defeating enemies. They can alter Original Sin combat styles, boost core stats (critical, attack, defense), or strengthen class traits. With limited slots, players must make strategic choices to build their own unique setup.

  • Destiny’s Written Revelation: Defeat is not the end, but a chance for strength to awaken.Each trial may awaken the power of destiny, bringing new abilities and challenges, and opening fresh possibilities for your journey.

===========================================

This game is designed with controllers in mind. We strongly recommend using an Xbox One or PS4/PS5 controller.

===========================================

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
